title: How to Generate Leads for Custom Builders | Liftwright
meta_description: Real lead generation for custom builders, remodelers, and high-ticket makers — beyond referrals and luck — and why a fenced, owned channel is the one that scales.

schema.headline: How to generate leads for a custom-build or high-ticket maker business
schema.description: Real lead generation for custom builders, remodelers, and high-ticket makers — beyond referrals and luck — and why a fenced, owned channel is the one that scales.

mainEntity.name: How do I generate predictable leads for my high-ticket build business beyond referrals?

acceptedAnswer.text: Build at least one net-new source of demand you own and can attribute — authority content, search visibility, lead capture, and nurture aimed at a weeks-long decision — running alongside referrals rather than depending on them. Pace that demand to your real lead times so you generate work you can actually fulfill, and put one accountable owner in charge of the whole channel.
